title: [PSS]PLR Status registers Check for Prochot Events
description:
Overview *

Base Flow Name: Validation of PLR Status bits for PROCHOT


High level description: Validate PLR Bit Set/Unset for Prochot once Prochot is injected


Arch/Block Diagram: Provide block diagram, FSM, Message/Transaction flow diagram to give better understanding. (use links where possible)
Perf Limit Reasons HAS (PLR)




** Unique PSS Interaction Coverage Requirements: **

PS - None of these checks require PSS Models, but these scenarios are mandatory to be completed and passing before we can complete Prochot PLR. 


- Inject PROCHOT using Socket PIN RTL on top.
- Check for uncore/io/mem ratios to get throttle to the lowest ratios
- Check for core ratios to first drop to Pmin then follow the PF Curve
- Check for Prochot Status Bits in punit.throttle
- Check for Prochot PLR Status bit SET using Mailbox accesses.

Configuration *
- PF curve fuses
- Pmin set for all the ratios

Pass/Fail criteria *



Unique Model  Requirements:

Describe any key model requirements, XTORS, BFM’s, FMOD’s, other hybrid components that are critical for this test case to achieve the HW/FW/BIOS interaction for this test case.

MCP IC HSLE <uncores>
MCP IC XOS <cores>
MCP ICC XOS <cores>

Coverage Assessment Technique

Specify any coverage assessment/measurement technique that might be used. How will the test cases intent be verified for coverage and  correctness? trackers, log files, etc? 

Primecode Tracker
Pcode Tracker 
Acode Tracker 

Extended Coverage

List and describe extended coverage from the base flow which may include any cross product coverage, negative val coverage, or stress coverage,  with this test case

Ingredients

Provide a list of ingredients required for the test case.  This should include items like FW, *code, BIOS, OS Drivers, etc.

Primecode
